body_txt: An attack or ability that damages the Mana Meter of the victim. The target often, but not necessarily, takes damage based on how much mana was removed. Other secondary effects may come in to play, but depriving the target of mana points is the ability's primary purpose. A fighter-type character or a specialized Anti-Magic wizard capable of removing enemy mana in a very short time will be able to remove a Squishy Wizard in a blink. This makes it a favored ability of the Mage Killer . A particularly sturdy Mana Shield can be easier dealt with by draining mana fueling it than by pounding at it with conventional attacks. Mana Drain is a subtrope where a portion of mana is transferred to the caster. A subtrope of Meta Magic , as it deals with impacting a supernatural ability. Compare Power Nullifier , which disables spell use more directly instead of getting rid of mana required for them. One of the means to Shoot the Mage First .
